name: Tex-Mex Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (7 1/2 oz) plain black olives or green olives (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss onion, tomatoes, lettuce and cheese with Italian dressing; set aside.
2. Brown meat in a pan until no longer pink. Add drained beans and vegetable seasoning; simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Mix the cooked meat mixture with cold salad. Toss in crushed tortilla chips and avocado slices.
4. Garnish with black olives, if desired.
